name: 18-invalid-version-mismatch
description: $schema URL references aibom-v0.1.0.json but aibom.schemaVersion declares "0.2.0". The two fields must agree. Per schema-rule, $schema is an immutable URL identifier of the exact schema file and aibom.schemaVersion is the machine-readable version string; disagreement between them indicates a malformed or tampered document.
notes: JSON Schema can enforce this alignment via a `const` or pattern constraint on aibom.schemaVersion tied to the $schema URL (rejectStage: schema-validation). If the schema cannot express the constraint directly, a downstream validator enforces it at version-negotiation stage. Either way, the document must not be accepted.
